positive: A stylized, minimalist jungle geometric pattern featuring abstract tropical leaves, stylized parrots, and meandering vine lines. The composition is highly symmetrical and centered, suitable for full-body apparel printing. Use a restricted color palette of deep emerald green, sapphire blue, gold metallic accents, and crisp cream white. The style should be a blend of Art Deco geometry and lush botanical illustration, ensuring clean, high-contrast silhouettes and crisp linework. Ideal for a repeat tile pattern, viewed front-on, sharp focus, highly detailed, high resolution.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, watermark, logo, text, signature, jpeg artifacts, messy, dirty, low contrast
